title: Slide!
description: Adds a momentum-based sliding mechanic to Minecraft.
body: Adds a momentum-based sliding mechanic to Minecraft. ## Requirements - **Fabric**: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - **Forge** : [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) + [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) ## Features - **Omni-Directional Sliding**: Move in any direction based on your WASD input, not just where you're looking. Back-sliding and side-sliding are fully supported. - **Velocity Inheritance**: Your sliding power scales with your speed. Combine it with sprinting, falling, or even **Elytra** flight for massive momentum. - **Slide Jumping**: Jumping between **0.2s and 0.4s** after starting a slide carries your momentum for a longer, faster jump. - **Downhill Momentum**: Sliding down slopes or drops slightly extends your slide duration. - **Activation Speed**: Works at walking speeds (with less power) but is most effective while sprinting. - **Fatigue System**: Each slide adds **20 fatigue** (max 100). Higher fatigue reduces slide power. Recovers at 30 pts/sec. - **Boosted Slide**: When fatigue is **0**, your next slide gets a speed boost but costs **40 fatigue**. - - **Entity Knockback**: Colliding with mobs or players during a slide deals knockback based on your current velocity. - **Tactical Hitbox**: Your hitbox shrinks to 1 block high during a slide, allowing you to pass through narrow gaps. ## Credits The animations and fundamental principles are based on [HyperSlide by Thebugger4](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hyperslide).
